rules.name: Ship Before Ready
rules.principle: Version 1.0 is supposed to be embarrassing. Ship it anyway and iterate.
rules.insight_template: What is the ugliest version of {project} you could put in front of one real person this week?

rules.name: Constraint as Catalyst
rules.principle: Constraints force creativity. Unlimited resources produce bloated work.
rules.insight_template: What one constraint — time, budget, format — could you impose on {project} to force a breakthrough?

rules.name: Volume Before Quality
rules.principle: High output volume is the fastest path to quality. The ceramics class that made 100 pots beat the one that made one perfect pot.
rules.insight_template: How could you increase your output volume on {creative_work} by 3x this month?

rules.name: Steal Like an Artist
rules.principle: Everything is a remix. Study the best, deconstruct it, rebuild it in your voice.
rules.insight_template: Which 3 creators in {domain} would you synthesize to define your own style?

rules.name: Separate Generation from Editing
rules.principle: Never edit while generating. They use different cognitive modes and each kills the other.
rules.insight_template: In your current {creative_process}, where are you editing before you have finished generating?

rules.name: Audience of One
rules.principle: Create for one specific person first. Universal appeal is found through specificity, not despite it.
rules.insight_template: Who is the single most specific person you are creating {work} for? Name them.

rules.name: Daily Minimum
rules.principle: Consistency of small output beats sporadic bursts. A daily minimum maintains creative momentum.
rules.insight_template: What is the smallest daily creative action on {project} that takes under 20 minutes?

rules.name: Input Quality
rules.principle: Creative output quality is bounded by input quality. Curate what you consume.
rules.insight_template: What low-quality input are you regularly consuming that is degrading your creative output?

rules.name: Cross-Domain Pollination
rules.principle: The best creative ideas come from importing solutions from unrelated domains.
rules.insight_template: What problem in {domain} could be solved by a solution that already exists in a completely different field?

rules.name: Public Commitment
rules.principle: Announcing creative work publicly raises completion rate dramatically.
rules.insight_template: Who could you tell about {project} today to create productive external accountability?
